title: Zosterophyllanthos sanchoi
taxonomy: Zosterophyllanthos sanchoi is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Podostemaceae. This family is commonly known as the riverweed or mudskipper family. The Podostemaceae family is a group of aquatic plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Zosterophyllanthos sanchoi is one of the many species within this family that are adapted to living in shallow water environments. The classification of Zosterophyllanthos sanchoi is further supported by its unique morphological features, such as its small size and succulent leaves.
intro: There is not enough information available about Zosterophyllanthos sanchoi.
